results.definition_en: To go to the place where the person talking is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 向說話者所在的位置移動過去；來、到達。
results.example_en: Please come here when you are ready.

results.definition_en: To come to have something, or come into some place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 取得、拿到，或抵達某地。
results.example_en: I will get the book from the table.
results.example_zh_tw: 我去把桌上的書拿過來。

results.definition_en: To let another person have or take something from you.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 把東西交給別人，讓對方擁有或拿走；給予。
results.example_en: She will give the gift to her friend.

results.definition_en: To move from one place to another, away from the person talking.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 從一處移動到另一處，離開說話者；去、走。
results.example_en: We go to the park every Sunday.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們每個星期天都會去公園。

results.definition_en: To go on having something, or to make it stay where it is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 持續擁有某物，或讓某物保持在原處；保留、保管。
results.example_en: Please keep the door open.

results.definition_en: To make it possible for someone to do something; to give them way.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 允許某人做某事；讓、容許。
results.example_en: Let her tell her story to you.
results.example_zh_tw: 讓她把她的故事告訴你。

results.definition_en: To put things together, so that a new thing comes into being.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 把材料或部分組合起來，形成新事物；做、製作。
results.example_en: She makes a cake for her family.
results.example_zh_tw: 她做了一個蛋糕給家人。

results.definition_en: To move a thing to a place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 把某物移到某處；放、擺。
results.example_en: Put the books on the shelf.

results.definition_en: To give the look of being something, but maybe not be it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 看起來像、似乎是；可能事實並非如此。
results.example_en: She seems happy with her new house.
results.example_zh_tw: 她對新房子似乎很滿意。

results.definition_en: To get something into your hand or to your side.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 拿、取；把人或物帶走。
results.example_en: Take this letter to the post office.

results.definition_en: To have living form; to be in some state.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 存在；處於某種狀態；作為繫詞表示「是」。
results.example_en: I will be at the meeting at ten.

results.definition_en: To make an act take place; to put work into something.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 做、進行；表示動作的執行。
results.example_en: What do you do every morning?
results.example_zh_tw: 你每天早上都做些什麼？

results.definition_en: To be the owner of a thing or to be in some condition.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 擁有、持有；具備某物或某狀態。
results.example_en: I have two brothers and one sister.
results.example_zh_tw: 我有兩個哥哥和一個妹妹。

results.definition_en: To put a thought into words.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 說、講；用言語表達想法。
results.example_en: She says she will come tomorrow.

results.definition_en: To get the picture of a thing through your eyes.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 看到、看見；用眼睛感知事物。
results.example_en: I see a bird on the tree.

results.definition_en: To make a thing or a person go to another place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 派、寄、送出去；讓某物或某人前往他處。
results.example_en: Send the letter to me by post.

results.definition_en: Word used to say that a thing is able to be, but is not certain.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 也許、可能；表示有可能性但不確定。
results.example_en: It may rain in the afternoon.

results.definition_en: Word used to say that a thing is going to be in time still to come.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 將要、會；表示未來時態。
results.example_en: I will come back tomorrow.

results.definition_en: Near to a place; or having to do with a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 在……附近；關於、有關。
results.example_en: We talked about the news.

results.definition_en: From one side of a thing to the other side.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 從一邊到另一邊；橫越、穿越。
results.example_en: The dog ran across the road.

results.definition_en: Later in time; or coming behind something.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 在……之後；隨後跟著。
results.example_en: We will go home after the meeting.
results.example_zh_tw: 會議結束後我們就回家。

results.definition_en: Touching or pushing on a thing; or in fight with it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 靠著、貼著；反對、對抗。
results.example_en: He put his hand against the wall.

results.definition_en: In the middle of a group of things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 在……之中；在一群當中。
results.example_en: The cat is among the flowers.

results.definition_en: In or near a place, or at a point in time.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 在……（地點或時間點）。
results.example_en: I will be at home at six.

results.definition_en: Earlier in time; or in the front of.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 在……之前；在前面。
results.example_en: Please wash your hands before the meal.
